dashboard.label: Flowtriq DDoS Overview
dashboard.description: DDoS detection events from Flowtriq nodes

search.query: sourcetype="flowtriq:incident" event_type="attack_start" (severity="critical" OR severity="high") | stats count

sourcetype="flowtriq:incident" event_type="attack_start" severity=$severity_filter$ | stats max(peak_bps) AS max_bps | eval max_bps_readable = case( max_bps >= 1000000000, round(max_bps/1000000000, 2) . " Gbps", max_bps >= 1000000, round(max_bps/1000000, 2) . " Mbps", max_bps >= 1000, round(max_bps/1000, 2) . " Kbps", true(), max_bps . " bps") | fields max_bps_readable
sourcetype="flowtriq:incident" event_type="attack_start" severity=$severity_filter$ | stats dc(node_name) AS nodes
sourcetype="flowtriq:incident" event_type="attack_start" severity=$severity_filter$ | timechart count by severity
sourcetype="flowtriq:incident" event_type="attack_start" severity=$severity_filter$ | stats count by attack_family | sort - count | head 10

sourcetype="flowtriq:incident" event_type="attack_start" | stats count by severity | eval sort_order = case(severity=="critical", 4, severity=="high", 3, severity=="medium", 2, severity=="low", 1, true(), 0) | sort sort_order

sourcetype="flowtriq:incident" event_type="attack_start" severity=$severity_filter$ | stats count AS incidents, max(peak_bps) AS max_bps, max(peak_pps) AS max_pps, values(attack_family) AS attack_types by node_name, node_ip | eval max_bps_readable = case( max_bps >= 1000000000, round(max_bps/1000000000, 2) . " Gbps", max_bps >= 1000000, round(max_bps/1000000, 2) . " Mbps", max_bps >= 1000, round(max_bps/1000, 2) . " Kbps", true(), max_bps . " bps") | eval max_pps_readable = case( max_pps >= 1000000, round(max_pps/1000000, 2) . " Mpps", max_pps >= 1000, round(max_pps/1000, 2) . " Kpps", true(), max_pps . " pps") | sort - incidents | head 20 | table node_name, node_ip, incidents, max_bps_readable, max_pps_readable, attack_types | rename node_name AS "Node", node_ip AS "IP", incidents AS "Incidents", max_bps_readable AS "Peak bps", max_pps_readable AS "Peak pps", attack_types AS "Attack Types"

sourcetype="flowtriq:incident" event_type="attack_start" severity=$severity_filter$ | sort - _time | head 50 | eval duration = if(isnotnull(resolved_at), tostring(strptime(resolved_at, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") - strptime(started_at, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"), "duration"), "ongoing") | eval bps = case( peak_bps >= 1000000000, round(peak_bps/1000000000, 2) . " Gbps", peak_bps >= 1000000, round(peak_bps/1000000, 2) . " Mbps", peak_bps >= 1000, round(peak_bps/1000, 2) . " Kbps", true(), peak_bps . " bps") | table _time, severity, attack_family, node_name, node_ip, bps, peak_pps, source_ip_count, confidence, duration, dashboard_url | rename _time AS "Time", severity AS "Severity", attack_family AS "Attack", node_name AS "Node", node_ip AS "Node IP", bps AS "Peak bps", peak_pps AS "Peak pps", source_ip_count AS "Sources", confidence AS "Confidence", duration AS "Duration", dashboard_url AS "Link"
